creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-fs/2023-April/002047.html>, for example: 

> To view an individual PR, use:
>   https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=(Bug Id).

This can change to: 

> To view a report:
> https://bugs.freebsd.org/Idnumber

You might also draw attention to the 'FreeBSD Bugzilla' search engine, which I use.
